summary: Excellent matrix recording that captures a high‑energy show with standout China Rider opener and soaring Eyes of the World improvisations.
review: The three reviewers all rave about this matrix source – it “melted studio monitors” and is described as crisp and immersive. The performance itself is praised for its nonstop improvisation, a thrilling China Rider opener and an especially memorable Eyes of the World jam, with even the ambience of hanging out near Jerry adding to the experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 4–5 stars and highlight both an outstanding matrix recording and a musically exciting show, with no negative comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the matrix as crystal‑clear, “melted my studio monitors,” and “excellent sounding,” indicating a well‑balanced mix of board and audience that captures both detail and atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is lauded for its free‑form improvisational flow – from a “China Rider” opener through extended jams like Eyes of the World and an Aiko segment that kept the crowd moving.

band_member_comments.Jerry: One reviewer remembers standing right next to Jerry as he entered, emphasizing his presence in the crowd.
band_member_comments.Drums: Comments note Billy (or Mickey) “screaming” during the Aiko jam, highlighting energetic drumming.
